title: Bookoli - Colour Your Own PAW Patrol T-Shirt Kit - Reusable Art and Craft Activity for Children 3-5 Years - Gifts for Boys - Contains Tshirt + 10 Washable Pens + Colouring Book
features: COLOUR YOUR OWN PAW PATROL T-SHIRT: Go colour crazy and style your own PAW-some dinosaur T-shirt with this amazing Colour Your Own PAW Patrol T-Shirt Boxset!

REUSBALE PAW PATROL T-SHIRT: This kit includes a cotton T-shirt printed with a PAW-some PAW Patrol pattern that you can colour and decorate with the 10 washable pens that are also in the kit. Also included in this kit is a book bursting with pup-tastic pictures to colour-in, including all your favourite PAW Patrol characters, from Chase to Skye, meaning the creative fun can go on for hours!

IDEAL FOR AGES 3-5 YEARS : This kit is ideal for ages 3-5 years, and is designed to provide a fun and fulfilling creative experience. Colour Your Own PAW Patrol T-Shirt Boxset provides a creative activity to engage children's artistic interests. Solo activity but can be a shared project with family and children.

WASH AND REPEAT: Simply wash the T-shirt to remove the pattern and you're ready to repeat and create a whole new design, meaning you can create a bold and unique tee for every wear! Design, wear, wash... again and again!

ENHANCES CONCENTRATION AND IMAGINATION: With everything included in one handy kit to get started making , this kit is for young children wanting to try a fun new art. Engaging in creative art activities also helps to develop a creative mindset in children
description: Go colour crazy and style your own pup-tastic PAW Patrol T-shirt with this amazing Colour Your Own PAW Patrol T-Shirt Boxset! This kit includes a cotton T-shirt printed with an action-packed PAW Patrol pattern featuring everyone’s favourite rescue pups, ready for you to colour and decorate with the 10 washable pens that are also in the kit! Then, simply wash the T-shirt to remove the colours and you're ready to repeat and create a whole new design, meaning you can create a bold and unique tee for every wear! Also included in this kit is a book bursting with PAW Patrol adventure scenes to colour-in, from Chase racing to the rescue to Skye soaring high above Adventure Bay, meaning the creative pup fun can go on for hours! Design, wear, wash... again and again! What’s Included: 24-page colouring book, 1 children's printed cotton T-shirt and 10 washable marker pens.
